title: TikTok Shop - Strategy PMO (Project Management Office)
matched_skills: Go-to-market strategy (IPC B2B GTM, GRG Banking product launches)
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination (HSBC PMO, USD 8M programme)
Budget planning and tracking (HSBC programme governance)
C-suite reporting and data storytelling (Power BI certified)
Chinese / Cantonese language (highly relevant for TikTok China-linked context)
missing_skills: 5+ years e-commerce operations or e-commerce strategy experience (hard requirement — not met)
E-commerce merchant growth and acquisition strategy
Category subcategory prioritisation in retail/e-commerce context
key_requirements: 5+ years experience in e-commerce operations or e-commerce strategy (REQUIRED)
Analytical, data-driven, structured thinking and goal-oriented
Ability to articulate thesis and strategies independently
cv_highlights: PMO at HSBC managing USD 8M digital transformation programme — demonstrates programme governance at scale
GTM strategy execution at IPC with 4.6M CNY revenue impact — closest analogue to e-commerce strategy role
Product go-to-market across 6 product lines at GRG Banking — strategic planning experience
Power BI certified with C-suite reporting background — data-driven mindset aligns with role requirements
Fluent in Chinese and Cantonese — strong cultural/language fit for TikTok (ByteDance) team dynamics
Multi-market experience: EMEA and APAC — relevant for TikTok's cross-regional operations
gaps: No direct e-commerce operations or e-commerce strategy experience — this is the primary hard barrier
No merchant acquisition, onboarding or marketplace operations background
No content commerce or creator economy exposure
Total experience (~4 years) falls short of the 5+ year minimum requirement
No subcategory merchandising or assortment planning experience
recommended_emphasis: Frame IPC GTM campaign as closest proxy to e-commerce growth strategy — quantify funnel impact
Emphasise structured thinking and analytical rigour (Power BI, data storytelling, budget modelling)
Highlight Chinese language fluency and cross-cultural coordination as a differentiator within TikTok
Position HSBC cross-functional programme delivery as evidence of operating across large matrixed organisations similar to ByteDance
If applying, cover letter should directly acknowledge the e-commerce gap and pivot to transferable PMO and strategy skills
recommendation: Low match. The 5+ year e-commerce operations or strategy requirement is a hard barrier Boru does not currently meet. GTM experience at IPC and programme governance at HSBC are genuinely transferable, and Chinese language fluency is a meaningful differentiator for TikTok. However, without e-commerce domain experience, this application is a long shot and should be deprioritised unless Boru has unreported e-commerce exposure. Consider only if targeting stretch roles intentionally.
